---
id: delete-identity
title: "Delete an Identity"
description:
  "Calling this endpoint irrecoverably and permanently deletes the
  [identity](https://www.ory.com/docs/kratos/concepts/identity-user-model) given its ID. This action can not be undone."
sidebar_label: "Delete an Identity"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "delete api-method"
info_path: reference/openapi/ory-apis
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint"
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails"
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema"
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes"
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs"
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem"
import Heading from "@theme/Heading"
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate"

<Heading as={"h1"} className={"openapi__heading"} children={"Delete an Identity"}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={"delete"} path={"/admin/identities/{id}"} context={"endpoint"}></MethodEndpoint>

Calling this endpoint irrecoverably and permanently deletes the
[identity](https://www.ory.com/docs/kratos/concepts/identity-user-model) given its ID. This action can not be undone. This
endpoint returns 204 when the identity was deleted or 404 if the identity was not found.

<Heading id={"request"} as={"h2"} className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails {...require("./delete-identity.ParamsDetails.json")}></ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema {...require("./delete-identity.RequestSchema.json")}></RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes {...require("./delete-identity.StatusCodes.json")}></StatusCodes>
